speaker: MATT
raw_text: And they made their way northward through the ever-shifting grasses to the outskirts of the Moonbrush, a heavy, heavy, forested wood that will lead them to their destination after that, which is the Gilded Run, a series of rivers that wrap around their final destination, the Shademirk Bog, where apparently this Vestige exists. So. Diving in where we were. The last time, you guys had managed to wander a few hours into the southern portion of the forest of the Moonbrush. Coming through, you realize that, as opposed to the rest of the Feywild you've encountered so far, which exists in a perpetual dusk, there is an actual starry sky and moonlight poking through of a full moon at portions of the canopy of this forest. Cruising ever forward, you stumbled upon what looked like some sort of a cave or cavern with a series of small stone and wooden trinkets and gifts that were left outside, as well as carved bones and rotting fruits, and you came to realize that these were probably left for the spiritual entity that lived and existed within this cavern. Upon some of these gifts being disturbed, the bear attacked, and Vex'ahlia summoned forth Trinket, her faithful companion bear. A battle took place, putting Trinket in a difficult position, but upon a brief discussion with this spirit bear, had proven himself a worthy entity, and was bestowed a boon, further solidifying the bond between Vex'ahlia and her faithful companion, Trinket. And that was where we left off.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Read your contract.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, yeah, it takes you a little bit, about ten minutes or so. Parts of it got scattered and lost amongst the rest of the objects left around, but you manage to reassemble your collection of tea accessories.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So we're alone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You are now alone in the center of that clearing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh my gods, what just happened? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Everything's under control. We're alive.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I heard growling. Did the bear try to kill you? I mean Trinket.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, yeah, Trinket tried to kill me, but don't worry, everything's fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Really glad you learned how to speak with animals.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Me too! Keyleth, can you open up the trees so our friends can get in?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Who? Our what? Who?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Aren't we blocked off?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The trees have laxed and reopened.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I was busy looking for my card. And I found it. Hi guys, my name is Vex'ahlia. Cool, yes, we're good. Can I search for that tea set that I tried to give him?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Tea set? What just happened?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an investigation check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Cool. Balls. Off to a good start.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'd like to take a look in the cave as well a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ten.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: From what you can tell, it looks like it's in the evening, with the moon up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You want me to lick it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, don't you have a thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Like healing? Like you want me to use a whole spell on this teensy-ass wuss cut?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If you care about me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I cast Cure Wounds on his little teeny-weeny cut.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that feels so much better.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Vex, what do you think, is a semi-precious gemstone skull worth going in and getting?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I think we should remember this place is-- well, it's probably going to disappear after we walk away. These things tend to move, don't they?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We should move toward our destination.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We need to focus on the bow. And it's really hard to say that, but I really--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The whole theory of a path is you're supposed to somewhat stay on it, I imagine.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So stay on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No more stops. Unless it's for the theater, we're not stopping again.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What time is it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Full journey here since you rested... make an intelligence check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If you care about me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.text: Oh, that feels so much better.

preceding_turns.text: From what you can tell, it looks like it's in the evening, with the moon up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And we've been awake for a while?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. After resting just outside of the Moonbrush, it's probably been three hours since you woke.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that feels so much better.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Vex, what do you think, is a semi-precious gemstone skull worth going in and getting?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA

preceding_turns.text: We need to focus on the bow. And it's really hard to say that, but I really--

preceding_turns.text: So stay on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What time is it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And we've been awake for a while?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Full journey here since you rested... make an intelligence check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20, except disadvantage because I'm exhausted. 16 plus two.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Right, so it's been a few hours since you regained consciousness. It wouldn't have made a huge difference, per se, but you were still reading the book. You're close now, at this point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. After resting just outside of the Moonbrush, it's probably been three hours since you woke.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, we rested?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Did you guys push on when you got there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I was wondering the same thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I thought we camped on the outskirts.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Whatever we decide right now is exactly what happened.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Right, so we camped and we got up, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes. What? Yes, of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I agree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I feel like there would have camping before going straight into the Moonbrush, and I think you may have been pressed for time at the event last time to try and do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All I know is my mansion spell has been ticked off. So I used it at least once in the last 47 hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I feel like we camped out right before we went into the Moonbrush.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We camped out right before that.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: About another two hours of travel duskward, and he's keeping a finger pointed in the direction, which is difficult for you because the moon placement in the sky has not changed. The correlation as to what you normally use in the Prime Material Plane to gauge direction has no use here whatsoever. So the best that you can do is try to keep yourself facing forward and using his occasional guidance to steer back on track.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We got betrayed by Clarota at the 11th hour, so--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're so much cooler now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, let's just put Vex and Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hold my hand, dear?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right." He takes your hand. Roll a survival check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He eats her hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17, okay. Holding your hand, you guys quietly begin to make your way through the Moonbrush.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Eyes out for any things.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're in your natural element, also. It's a forest.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Grog, can I ride on you?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Girl, you can always ride.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I just need to be reading.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Much like a kid in the backseat of a car on a cell phone, Scanlan is just reading through the book on the back of Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Station wagon. Facing backwards.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You can always ride on Trinket, too, Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No. Grog weirdly smells better than Trinket today.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So you two and Garmelie make your way upwards, pushing past bushes, and the trees here in the Moonbrush, which are getting thicker and thicker the further north you go. You hear the music getting louder and louder, and it's funny. You find yourself tapping the side of your leg to it. It's a nice beat. You begin to hear laughter. Sounds like jovial laughter, like people having a good time. Just a few voices. You hear two different voices going back and forth, laughing.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Should we send Vax ahead?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't think it's a good idea but if we're going to check it out you and I should go ahead. Yeah, let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Garmelie? Do you want to come with us? Go invisible?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Um. Okay?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I will hold your hand, don't worry dear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right." So he vanishes from sight. The two of you guys make your stealth checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, can I cast Pass Without a Trace on us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so adding plus ten to your stealth rolls.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Whoa. 28.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. The rest of you are staying behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That's absurd. You've been storing this shit after a week we've been gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: One way to find out. I'm going to take a shot at the violin.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I haven't done this in so long. 17 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17 to hit. That hits. Roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What did you aim at?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The violin.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I aim at one of the other ones?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you want to fire at the same time?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, since he shot, I want to shoot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which one are you shooting at, the drums?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What else was there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There was the drums, the flute, and the violin.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Drums.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll an attack for the drums.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The woods are full of Irishmen.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: 12 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, Flogging Molly's playing the Feywild, yo!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I rolled 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 hits, so damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12. And roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15, okay. Scanlan, I need you to roll a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Saving throw? Not at disadvantage? Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys with your natural 20s! Okay. Roll it again.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Back-to-back?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What the what?!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. You take 24 points of psychic damage, Scanlan. As both of you guys fire, both of the instruments scatter for a second, and there is an echo of psychic energy that resonates throughout the entirety of that grove. The fire shakes and dissipates, almost going out. Scanlan, you can see reach up and grab the sides of his head in pain. The guard and the wolf that were dancing do the same, except they both collapse immediately on the ground. A moment passes, the instruments reform, the music continues, and Scanlan goes right back into the dance.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, since he shot, I want to shoot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Which one are you shooting at, the drums?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What else was there?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There was the drums, the flute, and the violin.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Drums.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll an attack for the drums.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The woods are full of Irishmen.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: 12 points of damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, Flogging Molly's playing the Feywild, yo!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I rolled 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16 hits, so damage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 12. And roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15, okay. Scanlan, I need you to roll a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Saving throw? Not at disadvantage? Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys with your natural 20s! Okay. Roll it again.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Back-to-back?!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What the what?!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's absurd. You've been storing this shit after a week we've been gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't think that's happened since we played at home.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, it happened when I was saving him against the Briarwoods. Two natural 20s.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's right!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That was 35 episodes ago.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A few moments pass as the howling subsides and they all stare intently, keeping a bestial cage around you in the center of this forest. It's at that point you begin to hear (footfalls) what sounds like a series of heavy footfalls at a speed, and the sound of trees thrashed as various hanging vines and branches are snapped or passed at such a speed. There is a mass of black shadow that comes emerging from the brush, slamming into the side of one of the trees near you with a clattering (crash). You see it pressed up against the side before leaping off, rebounding, landing right beside you guys, separating your group, giving Scanlan, Vex, Trinket, and Garmelie pushed to one side and the rest of you to the other. You now see this giant, feral beast, humanoid in shape once it begins to stand, but larger than anything you've seen before, as the large wolf-man creature stands at full height, about 12, 13 feet tall, its shoulders wider than yours, Grog. A series of various jeweled necklaces adorn its throat, and you can see what appears to be a makeshift leather belt and armored leg piece that sit upon it. Rings glimmer around its fingers, and you can see a series of scars drawn across one side of its cheek that go down to its throat. It looks about at the rest of you, separated, glancing at each side. "So. You seek passage, yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe just make it come out of your iPad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's something. Sure, we'll go with that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Works for us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's how we did it at home, man!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is the best simulation of our old home game that I've had.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's enough to give you the feel. The tiger takes that step forward, leans in to you, and goes, "To parley or continue our hunt?" Looks at the other wolves. "Call Ukurat." And roars out to the air. The other wolves all together begin to howl in unison. (howls) Loudly into the sky. (howls)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What's Trinket doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Trinket's backed up with you guys, growling and facing off with the bear-like entity that's keeping eyes on Trinket but is still (growling) up into the air of the forest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Ukurat. Isn't that the big ghost bear?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, that was Oralan. Ukurat's the lycan leader.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: The small, glittering fey lights that you've seen throughout many of the darker forested areas of the Feywild since you arrived, now taking a look, they all slowly, gently drift in a singular direction before touching the ground and dissipating. Even though the wind that blew through with their arrival has faded, they all still drift in a direction as if they're being called a specific way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If you do not think you have a chance, perhaps you're best suited as our meal for the night."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we have a very good chance of defeating them. We are quite powerful. Just wondering why you haven't done it before.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We have fallen to their magic. We are not tested and tempered against such trickster cunning creatures. But if you speak like you've passed the campsite unscathed, perhaps you have skills we lack."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That is true. We probably do. We made quick work of the camp. It was a proud moment for us, one that will be storied for generations.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: This mystic-- Iotha, you said-- she has the power to subjugate your kind?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Does she have the power to create more lycans?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "She sees our kind to be exterminated."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Where can we find this site?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Follow the lights."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The lights?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You're not reading during this run. But as you guys are charging forward, Scanlan goes face-first over a heavy root into the ground. You guys have to double back, grab him, keep going. You push on, and you push on, and you push on for what seems like another 30 minutes to an hour. Your pace starts to slow due to general exhaustion and you're unable to keep that speed and that level of physical exertion for that long. Most of you can't. Grog is happy to go forever. Constitution of 20; he's good to go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so you guys continue pushing forward--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm shouting  The way is clear!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you guys run, and run, and run, and you're pushing through brush and pushing over elements and heavy hard portions of the floor. I need everyone to roll-- this is going to be an athletics check for the keeping up the endurance and the speed. This is not easy terrain you continue to push through.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Athletics?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I've got land stride, so I don't get slowed by any hard terrain.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're fine. You don't need to roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I rolled twice, because of disadvantage. Both were ones.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You've hit the spectrum today.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I rolled a one, but then I used Luck and I rolled a 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys, calm down on the extremes! There are other numbers between those two, you realize, on the dice.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm tired from reading.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's been a few episodes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, you're locked in here because of the pixies?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I feel like they're terrible communicators.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, they should've told us that. I don't think they wanted to tell us that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Would've been a good incentive for us to destroy the pixies. We can't proceed without destroying the pixies.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: A little communication is all we need!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can I take out my bloodaxe and go up to the magic barrier and hit it as hard as I can?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it. Roll an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is going to be appalling. Don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How do I do that? I forget. I'm kidding.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So you're taking a short rest or a long rest?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I feel like they weren't that bad of guys. They could've attacked us, and they didn't. They just want out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They're certainly no meaner than Grog is. They're just scarier.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I propose we take a nap. Go back and deal with the pixies one way or another.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I agree with Percival. I think all our options are shit. We pick the least shitty and see what happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan, can you sleep?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: If I read for a few more hours first, sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You'll take first watch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How long have we been up?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point in time, I'd say close to eight, nine hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So it hasn't been a full day. Let's call it an early night.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Read your book. We'll sleep.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right. You take first watch. We're going to zonk out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'll stay up, as well.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: A few hours pass. Keyleth hasn't returned. You're still reading.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I need you to make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's either a one or a 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll just start a new one. Don't worry about it. Fuck, why?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is this shit on camera? We're recording, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That one's a 19, can I go with the 19?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can't take it off the table before it's real.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Twice in a fucking row? What are the chances? Do it again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's a 16, that's good. Saving throw, so 21.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Constitution saving throw is 21 total?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I've got my ring of protection, which gives me a plus two.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right. So as you're peeing, you feel another warm tingle over one shoulder, and you feel your muscles tense a little bit, and then relax as the effect passes over you to no effect. The three pixies go, "We have to tell her. I don't trust it." And they all flutter off.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I head back to camp.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: She's already been up for four hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They saw you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They saw me as a cat.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What did they do to you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I think they tried to cast several spells on me, and by some luck of the draw, I managed to feline my way out of them. I think they are looking for me and us, and I won't be a tiger anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Can I use my ranger abilities and try to disguise where we're camping?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I help hide? I'll help her a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys find a little alcove by one of the bigger trees nearby that has some of the roots recess inward, and you build a small camp there that's covered with thatch and branches.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do we have any concept of what time it is in this perpetual night?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You really have none.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to get a little sleep, though, so I can get my spells back. Anybody else taking watch?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, stay up with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She needs to rest.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll stay up.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, so. You guys prepare your tea. You set up your music box. A couple more hours pass, the rest of you coming to a semblance of a restful sleep. The only ones who didn't get a restful sleep on this would be Vex and... Percy?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I will take the watch, and I will make some tea with the tea set.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The cups are bigger than they are. Oh, you made drowning pots for us all. How lovely. It's going to be a threat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I never did actually find out what this tea set does.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're about to find out, then, aren't we?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, you know what, and I take out my old wooden music box that I discovered.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, pull out all of your cursed items.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And I wind it up and make some pretty music.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Like a crazy grandma in the woods.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I am joining you for this ridiculous tea party.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like it, thank you. Don't drink out of the teacups, because I really think they might be cursed. Seriously, Percy, I know it's appealing to you, but don't get cursed again, all right?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That the end of Scanlan's turn? All right. It's now the pixies' turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah that's true, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll use two. A 4th-level spell, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 4th-level Fireball.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So it's 9d6.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Range is 150 feet. Radius is 20 feet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. As you pull out the wand and release it, one of the nearby pixies-- It has no effect.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Assholes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, they can do that, too?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, other people can counter.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Passive-aggressive dungeon master! Oh, that's so sad. Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So the wand once again sputters out, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's dead? Or it still might work after that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, it might still work after that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That one use, okay. Can I move any more, or am I all moved out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That's the end of your movement.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll inspire Keyleth. I'll turn to her and say: (singing) It's been a hard fey's night, and you've got to unfreeze Grog. It's been a hard fey's night, because we've been fighting like a dog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, I can do that.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right, that completes your turn. You take your inspiration dice. It is now the pixies' run. This one over here at this distance is glancing over and saw its leader get thrashed off to the side after having a series of daggers thrown into it. You attempted to cast a giant beam at that one in the distance as well, though, so I'm going to say it's going to go for you. Keyleth, I need you to make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as you rush up and begin casting it sees you rushing up and its eyes go wide for a second as it instinctually puts its hands out and the Thunderwave falls flat before you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Shit, I'm the worst at this!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Going to be a beaver again.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I am going to be a beaver again. That's it. That's all I can do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I thought he was a honey badger.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Little angry badger.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Who's alive still? I'll inspire... shit, I'm failing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I've never seen this before.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's broken. It's stealing all of his energy!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Inspire Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll inspire Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Which one?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The girl!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The guy!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't want to inspire him. I want to inspire her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's Vex.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Vex, the girl. I'll say  (singing) Vex is natural, Vex is fun! Vex is good when she's one-on-one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I was next to go, but that's still good.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don't know. I was a badger! I don't know what's been going on.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: We're gone for one week. You guys can save these for throughout the campaign. This is a pixie fight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This one here is going to dart past, and as it does, from tree to tree, I need you to make a constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Straight up 15. Fuck it, I'll use luck. I've got one more. Another 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15 total? All right, you are currently restrained as your body tightens up and you are unable to move, shift, take any actions.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did you go, too?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I was about to, but not anymore.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are you petrified, too?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, he's restrained.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did he get turned to stone?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: His body is beginning to turn to stone right now. His muscles are beginning to tense up. As this one darts past, it is going to attempt to-- I need you to make another constitution saving throw, Keyleth, as it watched it fade from the last one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I don't have any inspiration left. Natural 20! This is a real one, this time! A real one!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What is the deal?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You come to consciousness, Grog, suddenly, in a different space than you recall, a little stiff in the joints, like you just had a really bad night's sleep across a whole pallet of broken rock.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I walk over and scrape the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Takes a look at it. (howls) All the rest of the various members of his clan of the Fendirs begin to arrive in the distance. "Yes, my lord?" "The mystic is dead. Wipe up the village. Come. You have the rest of your deal to attend to." Turns around and begins walking back toward the city of the pixies.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We have some friends that are stone right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Then bring them along!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth, do you need help?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I take my last 5th-level spell to dump a Greater Restoration into Grog to bring him back from petrification.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You can't do it to two people at the same time?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I can burn my 7th-level spell to bring back Vax.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Maybe you should do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I will burn my 7th-level spell to Greater Restoration Vax and bring him back.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys begin trekking duskward again, finally getting to the outskirts of the city. As you reach the outer perimeter of the forest, you reach up and you find no barrier there. It has been dispelled, and you guys step forth into the field, hearing now as you travel further northward, duskward, the gentle sounds of rushing water begin to approach. Garmelie glances past you and goes, "Well, good news. We've reached the Gilded Run."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Is that a ritual? I don't believe it can be cast as a ritual, can it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Greater Restoration? I can't take my time with it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You would have to stay here the night and do it again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They'll figure it out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The gray ground that's been burned, is it just...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Just where the circle was.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not everything else?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No. Just the circle.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I feel like we just killed FernGully.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I know. We did kill FernGully.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but if they had any good in their heart, why would they be trapping travelers of any kind?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: They weren't trapping travelers of any kind, they were trapping the lycans.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Then they trapped us!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but then they let us out.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They didn't really let us out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Everyone was bad, including us, and we lived. That's it.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Well, travel to and from the center of the forest has taken a few hours, so it's been a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Bad news, we've reached the Gilded Run."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Let's sleep in the mansion tonight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm pretty tapped out.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I would love to.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But you can't?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I used my 7th-level spell to kill a pixie.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why is reaching the Gilded Run a bad thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's a difficult thing to pass. Those rivers are quite expedient."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Like rapids?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: If we sleep, I can come prepared with lots of Control Water spells.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we can sleep in the treetops, where Lord Ukurat sleeps.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, let's sleep up in the trees tonight, before we make our way into this area.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys head back into the Moonbrush. You ascend up into the canopy and prepare yourselves, finding an area of branches that can be cleared to give yourself a comfortable space to stay for the evening.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You realize it's only been an hour since we slept last, but it's all nighty.
